tickets.title: Implement Jira Integration for Bundle Ingestion
tickets.description: Create a Jira integration module that fetches issues from Jira using REST API and converts them into a valid local Product Bundle that can be used by the existing pipeline with python main.py run --bundle ....

tickets.title: Implement GitHub PR Comment/Review Poster for Run Outputs
tickets.description: Create a GitHub integration that reads pipeline run outputs and automatically posts a summary comment or review to a pull request, including recommendation summary, risks, next steps, and generated artifacts.

tickets.title: Generate final PM artifacts
tickets.description: Add artifact writers for prd.md, roadmap.json, experiment_plan.md, and decision_log.md, and integrate them into the pipeline.

tickets.title: Implement Feasibility & Delivery agent
tickets.description: Add an agent that identifies dependencies, constraints, complexity, phased delivery plan, and build-vs-buy triggers from context and requirements.

tickets.title: Implement Competitive & Positioning agent
tickets.description: Add an agent that parses competitor input, identifies parity vs. differentiation opportunities, and produces positioning plus messaging pillars.Acceptance Criteria:

tickets.title: Implement UX Requirements agent and backlog export
tickets.description: Build the requirements agent that produces journeys, requirements with acceptance criteria, edge cases, and backlog data, then export that backlog into backlog.csv.

tickets.title: Implement bundle validation utility
tickets.description: Add validation for bundle structure and referenced files before pipeline execution, including manifest parsing, schema checks, and missing-file reporting.

tickets.title: Define Product Bundle contract and example bundles
tickets.description: Create the structured Product Bundle input format with JSON schemas and provide example bundles such as sample_01 and demo_saas_onboarding to support local pipeline runs.

tickets.title: Add project documentation, prompts, templates, and config assets
tickets.description: Flesh out the missing developer and user-facing assets for docs, prompts, templates, config, and README so the project is easier to understand and operate. This is inferred from the mostly empty scaffolds and minimal README.

tickets.title: Implement Lead PM synthesis agent
tickets.description: Add the final synthesis agent that consumes all findings and produces the final recommendation, including executive summary, problem statement, scope guidance, tradeoffs, open questions, and success metrics.

tickets.title: Implement Metrics & Analytics agent
tickets.description: Add an agent that defines the feature area, goals, North Star metric, input metrics, guardrails, event taxonomy, integrity issues, and recommendations from the bundle context.

tickets.title: Implement Customer Insights agent
tickets.description: Add an agent that derives user segments, JTBD, insights, research gaps, and a lightweight validation plan from tickets and customer notes.

tickets.title: Build CLI for bundle validation and pipeline execution
tickets.description: Implement a command-line interface with run and validate commands, bundle path resolution, pre-run validation, and pipeline invocation.

tickets.title: Implement tracker/API integration layer
tickets.description: Build the missing integration layer for external systems such as Jira/ADO and expose an API or service entrypoint for non-CLI execution. This is inferred from the empty api/ and integrations/ scaffolds.

tickets.title: Add smoke and end-to-end automated tests
tickets.description: Create automated tests to verify that a minimal bundle and the reference sample bundle both produce expected outputs.

tickets.title: Add schema validation for run outputs
tickets.description: Validate produced JSON outputs against schemas and skip files whose schemas are not yet available, while still generating a validation report.

tickets.title: Integrate end-to-end orchestration pipeline
tickets.description: Wire all agents together into one orchestration flow with safe fallbacks, output writing, and optional strict validation behavior.

tickets.title: Implement Risk Guardrails agent with YAML policy pack
tickets.description: Build a policy-driven risk agent that evaluates privacy, auth, accessibility, pricing, and platform risks and produces a gating decision with required mitigations.

tickets.title: Implement Intake & Context agent
tickets.description: Build the gatekeeper agent that normalizes ticket input, applies ignore rules, deduplicates tickets, detects missing information, tags risk hotspots, and writes context_packet.json plus evidence_index.json.
